---
title: "Mergent Archives"
page-layout: article
---

# Mergent Archives

## Description

Historical corporate document archive including corporate manuals, municipal manuals, and annual reports. Supports company history, financial history, and archival business research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=https://www.mergentarchives.com/search.php)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
